official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound set_entity_data empty metadata fixture.
Official binary source for the entity id plus empty metadata body codec.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_entity_data packet id.

field_notes.entity_id: Primitive entity id fixture; does not prove entity existence.
field_notes.packed_items: Empty metadata list fixture only. Official codec writes EOF marker 255 and avoids SynchedEntityData serializer payloads.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_entity_data packet framing and dispatch/decode for one entity id plus empty metadata list only; do not infer entity existence, metadata serializers, metadata values, runtime entity state, or client-load completion.
